The '''''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 14''' was a role-playing publication.

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
*"[[From the Files of Corellia Antilles]]" by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]
*"[[Alien Encounters (article series)|Alien Encounters]]" by [[Trevor J. Wilson]] and [[Craig Robert Carey]]
*"[[Cynabar's Droid Datalog (article series)|Cynabar's Droid Datalog]]" by [[Drew Campbell]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]]
*"[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]]

*"[[Murder in Slushtime]]" by [[Barbara Hambly]]
*"[[The Breath of Gelgelar]]" by [[Jean Rabe]]
*"[[No Disintegrations, Please]]" by [[Paul Danner]]
*"[[Crimson Bounty]]" by [[Charlene Newcomb]] & [[Rich Handley]]
*"[[Special Ops: Drop Points]]" by [[John Beyer]] and [[Kathy Burdette]]
